items.title: Who is the suspect in the stabbings?
items.raw_content: Two Jewish men have been stabbed in Golders Green, north London, an attack police have declared a terrorist incident.
items.ai_summary: 伦敦北部两名犹太男子被刺伤，警方定性为恐怖袭击。

items.title: Saudi Arabia to stop funding LIV Golf next season
items.raw_content: Saudi Arabia will withdraw its multi-billion dollar backing of LIV Golf at the end of the season, plunging the future of the series into doubt.
items.ai_summary: 沙特将在赛季末停止对LIV高尔夫的数十亿美元资助，系列赛未来成疑。

items.title: Saudi Arabia to stop funding LIV Golf at end of season
items.raw_content: Saudi Arabia will withdraw its multi-billion dollar backing of LIV Golf at the end of the season, plunging the future of the series into doubt.
items.ai_summary: 沙特将在赛季末停止对LIV高尔夫的数十亿美元资助，系列赛未来成疑。

items.title: Oil price jumps after report Trump to be given new Iran options
items.raw_content: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.
items.ai_summary: 报道称美国中央司令部准备对伊朗进行打击，油价应声上涨。

items.title: Hereditary peers' last hurrah as 700-year-old system abolished
items.raw_content: It comes after legislation to remove their right to sit in the upper chamber passed last month.
items.ai_summary: 世袭贵族制度废除，700年历史的上议院席位传统终结。

items.title: 'I did not expect it': Kenya's Sabastian Sawe welcomed home with jubilant celebrations
items.raw_content: The first man to run a marathon in under two hours in a competitive race received a hero's welcome from supporters and family when he arrived home.
items.ai_summary: 肯尼亚选手Sabastian Sawe成为首位在正式比赛跑进2小时的马拉松选手，回国受到热烈欢迎。

items.title: Video that police denied existed shows woman pinned down
items.raw_content: Nadine Buzzard-Quashie speaks for first time about her "David and Goliath battle" against two police forces.
items.ai_summary: 一名女性首次讲述与两个警察机构对抗的经历，警方曾否认存在的视频显示她被压制。

items.title: Lomu, Wilkinson, Pollock? Rugby's search for a crossover star
items.raw_content: Henry Pollock has signed with Eddie Hearn's talent agency in the hope of boosting his profile, but why has rugby found it so hard to forge mainstream figureheads?
items.ai_summary: 橄榄球运动员Henry Pollock签约知名经纪公司以提升知名度，文章探讨橄榄球为何难以培养出跨界明星。

items.title: New Arsenal deal for England captain Williamson
items.raw_content: Leah Williamson is the fourth player to commit her future to the club in recent weeks, with Kim Little, Stina Blackstenius, and Steph Catley also signing new deals.

items.title: Parker leaves Burnley after Premier League relegation
items.raw_content: Burnley head coach Scott Parker leaves the club following talks with the club's hierarchy.
